g.text: 0x00 | float | data // The actual scalar value

div.p: The atomic unit of micrograd's computational graph
Forward Pass Storage Stores the result of the operation. Example: if a=2.0, b=3.0, c = a*b, c.data is 6.0.
Backprop Accumulator Initialized to 0.0. During backward(), local gradients are added via +=.
Graph Edges A set of the Value objects used to calculate this object. Used for topological sort.
Chain Rule Closure Internal function that propagates self.grad to the grad of objects in _prev.
